message:
fix(models): add per-model reasoning detection for DeepSeek, Mistral, and Llama

DeepSeek-chat, Mistral, Codestral, Pixtral, and Llama models were
incorrectly inheriting reasoning=true from their provider defaults.
Only deepseek-reasoner/deepseek-r1 support reasoning; the rest do not.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
